## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content prioritization, and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prioritize content refreshes and new content for 43-44 key keywords, focusing on core pillars (observability, reliability, governance, evaluation)](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Restructure content categories into a hierarchy: broad category \> subcategory \> theme](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Align CTAs and content strategy to create a more effective funnel, differentiating between high and low buyer intent](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Create a new tab in Airtable for September term refresh, including keyword-level tracking and publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Delivered 7 articles, published 14 last week](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [22 articles awaiting client review](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Working on 8 articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Revamped content clusters for new focus (observability, reliability, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Slight drop in engaged sessions, but positions maintained](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [127 evaluation-related keywords ranking in top 10, avg position in top 5](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Non-branded and branded performance increasing](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Galileo ranking for 329 keywords (up from 305), closing gap with competitors](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Content Prioritization and Categorization

  - [Focus on core pillars: observability, evaluations, governance, reliability, and guardrails](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)
  - [Deprioritize miscellaneous topics, research papers, and model reviews](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2185.0)
  - [Restructure categories: Use case level \> Theme level \> Sub-theme/Content type](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2604.0)
  - [Align content to different areas of the funnel (top, middle, bottom)](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2628.0)
  - [Create distinct plans for nurture sequences and CTAs related to categories and themes](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2440.0)

### Keyword Strategy

  - [Balance between broad terms and long-tail, high-intent commercial keywords](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [Cross-reference SEMrush and Google Keyword Planner for more accurate volume trends](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Focus on keywords likely to convert into deals, even if currently lower volume](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2876.0)

### Content Refresh and New Content Plan

  - [Identify existing content for refresh based on key terms](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Prioritize new content for missing keywords in core areas](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Create a new Airtable tab for September term refresh, including publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)

### Pillar Pages and Model Hub Pages

  - [Pillar page design passed to web dev agency, expected completion next week](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Manual solution for model hub pages graphs as a stopgap](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Need to build dynamic components for scalability in the future](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)

  - [GrowthX to prepare a plan for the next few months, including context on past, present, and future strategy](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=2683.0)
  - [Conor and Jackson to review CTAs and identify gaps in thematic lead gen assets](https://fathom.video/share/KB8aySK4bsSyT5SXT9oDsSzDxcrN4yYg?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
